summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Simplifile AI backend APIs and frontend functionality. All backend features including structured AI prompts are working correctly. Frontend loads successfully with user registration and authentication flows operational.

ui_bugs.issue: Session management during navigation - possible logout during page transitions

passed_tests: Backend API health checks (root, health endpoints)
User registration creates user with trial status
User login returns valid JWT token
Document analysis returns structured response with all required fields (summary, key_points, risks, obligations, simple_explanation, what_this_means)
Chat endpoint returns structured response with 'What This Means For You' section
Bookkeeping insights endpoint returns ai_analysis field
Subscription plans endpoint with correct pricing

success_percentage.frontend: 85% (core functionality working, minor session management issue during navigation)
